Motion To Dismiss Untimely Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner

APPEARANCES:

Anthony Silvestri, Esq. (415.233.2619; tcsilvestri@gmail.com) Defendant in propria persona VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
